task.title: Submit a scholarship application form
task.goal: Complete and submit the scholarship application form.

summary: Sample placeholder report for a fictional education task.

issues.title: Keyboard form completion needs verification
issues.evidence: The task includes a form and should be tested using only Tab, Shift+Tab, Enter, Space, and arrow keys.
issues.suggested_fix: Ensure every field, button, and error message can be reached and used with the keyboard.

issues.title: Plain-language review needed
issues.evidence: Application instructions may be difficult if presented as dense paragraphs.
issues.suggested_fix: Use short sentences, clear headings, bullet points, and direct error messages.
